message:
feat(sdk): add set_model(), thinking(), and compact() methods to
AgentSessionHandle, with underlying AgentSession plumbing

AgentSession (agent.rs):
- Add `pub async fn set_provider_model(&mut self, provider_id, model_id)`
  that updates the session model header, applies the selection to the
  active agent, validates the switch succeeded, and persists to disk
- Add `pub async fn compact_now(&mut self, on_event)` that exposes
  the existing maybe_compact() logic as a public API for on-demand
  context compaction

AgentSessionHandle (sdk.rs):
- Add `pub async fn set_model(&mut self, provider, model_id)` that
  delegates to AgentSession::set_provider_model for runtime model
  switching — enables extensions and SDK consumers to change the
  active provider/model pair mid-conversation
- Add `pub const fn thinking()` as an alias for thinking_level()
  to match the SDK naming convention
- Add `pub async fn compact(&mut self, on_event)` that delegates
  to AgentSession::compact_now for on-demand compaction triggers
- Add unit test `create_agent_session_set_model_switches_provider_model`
  verifying the set_model flow end-to-end

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
